/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/sift_interfaces/sift_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/sift_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/sift_interfaces/_sift_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sberk/Desktop/paralel/build/sift_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib libsift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libsift_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so libsift_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
